use std::fs::File;
use std::io::{BufWriter, Write};

struct ReportWriter {
    writer: BufWriter<File>,
    records_written: usize,
}

impl ReportWriter {
    fn new(path: &str) -> Self {
        let file = File::create(path).unwrap();
        Self {
            writer: BufWriter::new(file),
            records_written: 0,
        }
    }

    fn write_record(&mut self, data: &str) {
        writeln!(self.writer, "{}", data).unwrap();
        self.records_written += 1;
    }

    fn flush(&mut self) -> std::io::Result<()> {
        self.writer.flush()
    }
}

// GOOD: explicit flush at ownership boundary
fn generate_report(path: &str) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    let mut report = ReportWriter::new(path);
    for i in 0..1000 {
        report.write_record(&format!("record_{}", i));
    }
    report.flush()
}
